zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary de Grey於大約1340年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾盧時，她的父親Reynold Grey19歲，母親Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn14歲。她於1373年與Sir William d'Isney IV在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1389年在威爾士丹比爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary de Grey于大约1340年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾盧时，她的父亲Reynold Grey19岁，母亲Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn14岁。她于1373年与Sir William d'Isney IV在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1389年在威尔士丹比爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary de Grey was born about 1340, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Reynold Grey, was 19 and her mother, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, was 14. She married Sir William d'Isney IV in 1373, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1389, in Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary de Grey est née environ 1340, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reynold Grey, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William d'Isney IV en 1373, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1389, à Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Mary de Grey um 1340 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reynold Grey 19 und ihre Mutter Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn 14. Sie hat 1373 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William d'Isney IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1389 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales.

Lei sposato Sir William d'Isney IV nel 1373, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1389, nel Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary de Greyが約1340年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Reynold Greyは19歳，母Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthynは14歳であった。1373年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでSir William d'Isney IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1389年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: 영국 잉글랜드 타이니 앤드 위르 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Mary de Grey(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reynold Grey(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Sir William d'Isney IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Sir William d'Isney IV em 1373, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1389, em Denbighshire, Gales, com 50 anos.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear, Engl: нюкастл упон тин, тин анд вир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary de Grey родилась около 1340 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reynold Grey было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alianore le Strange Baroness Grey of Ruthyn, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William d'Isney IV в 1373 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1389 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Sir William d'Isney IV en 1373, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1389, en Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 50 años.
